name: Unicorn's Broccoli & Mushroom Quesadillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion; mushrooms, garlic, and herbs in butter over medium heat until lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
2. Spoon the mixture onto 4 tortillas placed on lightly greased cookie sheets.
3. Top each tortilla with broccoli and cheese and a second tortilla.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven until cheese melts, about 10 minutes.
5. Cut each quesadilla into wedges to serve. Serves 4.
